Class StructuralModule

java.lang.Object
Model.Ship.Components.SpaceshipComponent
Model.Ship.Components.StructuralModule
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class StructuralModule extends SpaceshipComponent
Represents a Structural Module component in Galaxy Trucker. Structural modules serve to expand ship connectivity but do not serve active functions.
See Also:
